# kopsutils_limited_length_name (Data Source)

Computes kОps' gce.LimitedLengthName(input, max_length): returns input unchanged when it fits within max_length, otherwise appends a 6-char fnv32a/base32hex hash and truncates so the result is at most max_length characters.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# gce.LimitedLengthName(input, max_length): long names are truncated and get a
# 6-char fnv32a/base32hex hash appended; short names are returned unchanged.
data "kopsutils_limited_length_name" "ig" {
  input      = "control-plane-us-west1-a-cluster-e2b-dev"
  max_length = 32
}

output "name_prefix" {
  value = data.kopsutils_limited_length_name.ig.result
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `input` (String) The name to (possibly) truncate.
- `max_length` (Number) Maximum allowed length of the result.

### Read-Only

- `result` (String) The length-limited name.
